channel.title: Strategic Enrollment Marketing | Derby Carlson
channel.description: Recent content on Strategic Enrollment Marketing | Derby Carlson

item.title: Wrestling 20,000 Rows of Pure Chaos.
item.description:
The monthly name buy is here. Every time I open this 20,000-row spreadsheet, a small part of me contemplates a career in professional goat herding. But then, the Excel shortcuts kick in. I’ve reached a level of nerdery where VLOOKUPs and pivot tables feel like superpowers. Data hygiene isn’t always glamorous, but when you get to the 20,000 line… God, do you feel accomplished for the day.

> Status: Scrubbed. De-duped. Uploaded.

item.title: LET'S GOOOOOO! (Admitted Student Day: Registration Closed Early)
item.description:
I’m not going to lie: Admitted Student Day has been my ‘baby’ for the last six weeks…

> SYSTEM UPDATE: Registration Cap Reached. Campaign ROI: Optimized.

item.title: But... Why? (The Housing Email Intervention)
item.description:
Today’s mission: The ‘Living here is 24/7 Spring Break’ housing email…

> Status: Email Approved. Fluff minimized. Student inboxes saved.

item.title: WE MADE THE PLAYOFFS?! (Narrator: They did not.)
item.description:
It’s March. The air is electric. I saw the words ‘Playoffs,’ ‘Watch Party,’ and ‘Free Food’ in a Teams thread…

> Status: Campaign Shelved. Assets archived.

item.title: The Expired Link Apocalypse.
item.description:
As I was pulling my annual metrics… I sent out the Prospective Student Day invite, but forgot to update the registration link.

> CRITICAL: Broken link detected. 'The Oopsie-Campaign' outperformed the original by 40%.

item.title: It’s Alive! The Meta Inquiry Flow is Live.
item.description:
Yesterday’s battle with the Sandbox is officially won. Now, when I upload a batch through DataLoader, TargetX automatically recognizes them as Meta Ad leads.

> Log: Success. Automation deployed.
